text: The new dashboard is fantastic — clean, fast, and easy to use. Our team adopted it within a day.
Mobile app crashes every time I open the reports tab. Please fix this ASAP, it's blocking my work.
Pricing is a bit high for small teams. Would love a startup tier around $19/mo.
The onboarding is great but the documentation is missing webhook examples.
Honestly the best customer support I've ever had — response in 5 minutes, real solution, follow-up next day.
Dark mode would be a nice addition. Otherwise the app is perfect.
Got a chargeback email even though my payment was processed correctly. This is concerning and looks like fraud.
Performance has improved a lot since the last release. Kudos to the engineering team.
Two-factor authentication reset is broken — I lost access to my account and had to contact support.
Integration with Slack works flawlessly. Saves me an hour every week.
Refund please — the subscription renewed automatically without warning. This is a bug.
The UI is intuitive and the design feels modern. I especially like the keyboard shortcuts.
Outage last night took down our production environment for 2 hours. Need a status page and better incident communication.
The free trial was perfect to evaluate the product. Converted to paid without hesitation.
Loading is slow when the dataset has more than 10k rows. Could you add pagination?
Love the simplicity. No clutter, no upsells, just a tool that works.
The CSV export is missing the sentiment column. Please add it.
Spam — buy crypto now huge returns guaranteed
Webhook stopped firing after the 1.4 release. Our integration has been silent for two days.
Would be great to have a public API. Right now everything goes through the dashboard.
Premium support has been very responsive and saved our launch last week. Worth every dollar.
Confusing navigation — I had to click 5 times to find the settings page.
Push notifications on iOS are great. The Android version is missing.
Updated my billing info and got an error 500. Had to retry 3 times.
The mobile app is a delight. Five stars from me.
Constant bugs in the editor. Saving fails randomly, content gets duplicated, frustrating.
Great product overall, but the pricing for the enterprise tier is unclear and requires a sales call.
Auto-save is a lifesaver. Lost work used to be my #1 frustration.
The new search is amazing. So much faster than before.
Login flow has a confusing 2FA step that asks for codes from two different apps.
Best tool of its kind that I've tried. Switching from a competitor was easy.
Data loss yesterday — my project was empty when I logged in this morning. Need an urgent fix and explanation.
The blog integration is broken — images don't upload reliably.
Customer service chat was offline all weekend. Nobody answered my ticket until Monday.
Beautiful UI and thoughtful details. The empty states are especially nice.
Email notifications are too frequent. Let me choose what I want to hear about.
API documentation is top-notch. The examples are real and copy-pasteable.
Need a way to export to PDF with custom branding for client reports.
App froze three times today on my iPhone 15. Please fix the stability.
Setup took me 5 minutes. Amazing.
The price increase is unfortunate. We were just getting started.
Security features are solid — SSO, audit logs, granular permissions. Exactly what we needed.
Hate the new sidebar layout. The previous version was better.
Live chat widget is a game changer for our support team. Saves us 10+ hours a week.
Three days of downtime this month is unacceptable for a paid product. Considering a refund.
QuickBooks integration is exactly what I needed for my bookkeeping. Thank you!
The dark theme has a contrast issue in the sidebar — some labels are unreadable.
Reliable, fast, and the API is well designed. Our integration shipped in 2 days.
Lost my entire workspace due to a sync conflict. This is critical, please investigate.
Marketing copy is misleading — feature X is not actually available in the pro plan.
Help center articles are clear and searchable. Rare these days.
App is fast and lightweight. Doesn't drain my laptop battery like competitors.
The audit log is missing entries for actions taken by API tokens. Important for compliance.
Onboarding emails are friendly and helpful. Made me feel welcome.
Confusing pricing — I don't know which plan I need. A comparison table would help.
Crash report when uploading files larger than 50MB. Please increase the limit or fix the bug.
The new AI features are surprisingly useful. Saves me time on writing product descriptions.
Two-factor codes sometimes take 30 seconds to arrive. Frustrating when logging in quickly.
Stable, predictable, no surprises. The kind of tool you stop thinking about and just use.
Search filters are accurate, but saved views reset after refresh. Please make them persistent.
